# Flyto2 Docs

> Flyto2 Docs documents the Flyto2 Warroom, an evidence-backed CTEM/security war room that integrates existing ASM, dark web, code security, pentest, and red-team signals into one workflow.

## Start here

- https://docs.flyto2.com/warroom/
- https://docs.flyto2.com/warroom/overview
- https://docs.flyto2.com/warroom/byo-integration
- https://docs.flyto2.com/warroom/closed-loop
- https://docs.flyto2.com/warroom/surfaces/

## Core Warroom surfaces

- External attack surface / CTEM: https://docs.flyto2.com/warroom/surfaces/attack-surface
- Asset map: https://docs.flyto2.com/warroom/surfaces/asset-map
- Code intelligence: https://docs.flyto2.com/warroom/surfaces/code-intelligence
- Darkweb and threat intelligence: https://docs.flyto2.com/warroom/surfaces/darkweb-threat-intel
- MCP security: https://docs.flyto2.com/warroom/surfaces/mcp-security
- Pentest: https://docs.flyto2.com/warroom/surfaces/pentest
- Red-team simulation: https://docs.flyto2.com/warroom/surfaces/red-team
- Unified scoring: https://docs.flyto2.com/warroom/surfaces/unified-scoring

## Product context

Flyto2 complements and integrates existing security tools. Customers can bring existing scanners, external-rating signals, dark web feeds, repositories, cloud posture, CMDB, and asset data. Flyto2 correlates those inputs, validates what matters, and turns findings into evidence-backed action.

- https://docs.flyto2.com/llms-full.txt
- https://flyto2.com/llms.txt
- https://blog.flyto2.com/llms.txt
